angle: A short video showing guest messages being answered on their own, in the host's voice, so the whole exchange resolves itself and leaves a warm feeling of reassurance.
brief: Remotion motion piece on the animated-messages composition, light. The Host chat UI animates: a guest asks a question, Hostie types and replies in the host's voice, the guest is put at ease, Hostie signs off. The exchange resolves itself, calm and warm. Headline and subhead carry the message; the in-chat copy is reproduced UI, not marketing copy. pillar: runs-itself, funnel: reach.

copy.headline: Guest messages answered by AI
copy.subhead: Hostie replies in your voice, day and night, so no one is left waiting and you are never on call.

cta.line: All your messages answered for you
